videos.headline: Ole Miss' 41-yard gain sets up J.J. Pegues' 2nd rushing TD
videos.description: Jaxon Dart launches a dart to Jordan Watkins for a 41-yard gain, then J.J. Pegues walks into the end zone for his second rushing touchdown.

videos.headline: Ole Miss' 4th-down stop sets up a Parrish Jr. TD
videos.description: Ole Miss stuffs South Carolina on an attempted fake punt, then Henry Parrish Jr. punches it in for a Rebels touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ole Miss' 4th-down stop sets up a Parrish Jr. TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ole Miss' fumble recovery sets up a big-man TD
videos.description: Walter Nolen recovers the fumble for the Rebels, which sets up J.J. Pegues' third rushing touchdown.
